visual_description: A group of people walks toward the camera down a dimly lit wooden corridor with stone walls. They are visible as silhouettes or faintly illuminated figures, appearing to move steadily forward. The camera angle is low, focusing on the wooden floor, with the group gradually approaching the foreground.
